message.content:
以下のファイルを修正してください。worktreeパス: /Users/so/MyWorkSpace/personal/care-inomi/.worktrees/feature/content-update/

1. astro.config.mjs
   - site: 'https://ainomi.co.jp' → 'https://shirocare.com'

2. .env.example
   - PUBLIC_SITE_URL=https://ainomi.co.jp → https://shirocare.com

3. src/lib/constants.ts
   - SITE_CONFIG.name: "合同会社あいのみ" → "SHIRO CARE合同会社"
   - SITE_CONFIG.url: "https://ainomi.co.jp" → "https://shirocare.com"
   - COMPANY_INFO を以下に更新:
     - name: "SHIRO CARE合同会社"
     - officeName: "居宅介護支援事業所あいのみ" (新規追加)
     - address: "東京都"（そのまま）
     - founded: "2023年11月"
     - officeOpened: "2024年4月" (新規追加)
     - representative: "大城美佐子"
     - business: そのまま

content.text: 指定されたworktreeパスのファイルを確認して修正します。

content.content:
1→# Site Configuration
     2→PUBLIC_SITE_URL=https://ainomi.co.jp
     3→
     4→# LINE Configuration
     5→PUBLIC_LINE_URL=https://line.me/R/ti/p/@xxxxx
     6→

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

1→// Site configuration
     2→export const SITE_CONFIG = {
     3→  name: "合同会社あいのみ",
     4→  url: import.meta.env.PUBLIC_SITE_URL || "https://ainomi.co.jp",
     5→  description: "仕事と介護の両立を支援する産業ケアマネージャー。介護離職防止のための企業向けサービスを提供しています。",
     6→  locale: "ja_JP",
     7→} as const;
     8→
     9→// LINE configuration
    10→export const LINE_CONFIG = {
    11→  url: import.meta.env.PUBLIC_LINE_URL || "https://line.me/R/ti/p/@xxxxx",
    12→  qrCodePath: "/images/line-qr.png",
    13→} as const;
    14→
    15→// Navigation items
    16→export interface NavItem {
    17→  label: string;
    18→  href: string;
    19→  children?: NavItem[];
    20→}
    21→
    22→export const NAV_ITEMS: NavItem[] = [
    23→  { label: "ホーム", href: "/" },
    24→  {
    25→    label: "サービス",
    26→    href: "/services",
    27→    children: [
    28→      { label: "産業ケアマネ", href: "/services/industrial-care" },
    29→      { label: "ケアマネジメント", href: "/services/care-management" },
    30→      { label: "研修・講演", href: "/services/training" },
    31→    ],
    32→  },
    33→  { label: "会社概要", href: "/about" },
    34→  { label: "お問い合わせ", href: "/contact" },
    35→];
    36→
    37→// Service cards for home page
    38→export const SERVICE_CARDS = [
    39→  {
    40→    id: "industrial-care",
    41→    icon: "Briefcase",
    42→    image: "/images/service-industrial.jpg",
    43→    title: "産業ケアマネ",
    44→    description: "企業の介護離職防止を支援。従業員と企業の両方をサポートします。",
    45→    href: "/services/industrial-care",
    46→  },
    47→  {
    48→    id: "care-management",
    49→    icon: "Heart",
    50→    image: "/images/service-care.jpg",
    51→    title: "ケアマネジメント",
    52→    description: "東京・神奈川・埼玉・千葉でケアプラン作成からサービス調整まで。",
    53→    href: "/services/care-management",
    54→  },
    55→  {
    56→    id: "training",
    57→    icon: "GraduationCap",
    58→    image: "/images/service-training.jpg",
    59→    title: "研修・講演",
    60→    description: "介護離職防止セミナーや管理職向け研修を企業に提供します。",
    61→    href: "/services/training",
    62→  },
    63→] as const;
    64→
    65→// Company information
    66→export const COMPANY_INFO = {
    67→  name: "合同会社あいのみ",
    68→  address: "東京都", // TODO: Update with actual address
    69→  founded: "2024年",
    70→  representative: "", // TODO: Update with actual name
    71→  business: [
    72→    "産業ケアマネージャー事業",
    73→    "居宅介護支援事業",
    74→    "研修・講演事業",
    75→  ],
    76→} as const;
    77→

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

content.text: ファイルを確認しました。3つのファイルを修正します。

content.text:
修正完了しました。

## 修正内容まとめ

### 1. `/Users/so/MyWorkSpace/personal/care-inomi/.worktrees/feature/content-update/astro.config.mjs`
- `site: 'https://ainomi.co.jp'` → `site: 'https://shirocare.com'`

### 2. `/Users/so/MyWorkSpace/personal/care-inomi/.worktrees/feature/content-update/.env.example`
- `PUBLIC_SITE_URL=https://ainomi.co.jp` → `PUBLIC_SITE_URL=https://shirocare.com`

### 3. `/Users/so/MyWorkSpace/personal/care-inomi/.worktrees/feature/content-update/src/lib/constants.ts`
- `SITE_CONFIG.name`: "合同会社あいのみ" → "SHIRO CARE合同会社"
- `SITE_CONFIG.url`: "https://ainomi.co.jp" → "https://shirocare.com"
- `COMPANY_INFO` を更新:
  - `name`: "SHIRO CARE合同会社"
  - `officeName`: "居宅介護支援事業所あいのみ" (新規追加)
  - `address`: "東京都" (そのまま)
  - `founded`: "2023年11月"
  - `officeOpened`: "2024年4月" (新規追加)
  - `representative`: "大城美佐子"
  - `business`: そのまま
